## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- user-visible impact

## Verification

- [ ] `bun run typecheck`
- [ ] `bun run lint`
- [ ] `bun run smoke-test`
- [ ] relevant integration tests, if behavior touched lifecycle/hooks/RPC/worktrees

## Docs

- [ ] README updated if commands/env/package metadata changed
- [ ] docs updated if operator behavior changed
- [ ] changelog entry added if appropriate

## Risk

- rollout / migration notes
- compatibility notes
- follow-up work if any
